<!-- What does this PR do? Why? -->

## Type of Change
- [ ] feat: New feature
- [ ] fix: Bug fix
- [ ] docs: Documentation only
- [ ] chore: Build, CI, tooling
- [ ] breaking: Breaking change

- [ ] schema changes have corresponding test updates
- [ ] agent definition changes have documentation updates
